title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your profile, appearance, security, and privacy preferences
passwordRequirements: Minimum 12 characters, with uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character
2faDescription: Add an extra layer of security by requiring a code from your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.) when signing in.
2faScanQR: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app:
2faEnterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
2faDisableWarning: To disable 2FA, enter your password and a current code from your authenticator app.
aiConsentDesc: Allow LeanPilot to process your production data with AI for insights, root cause analysis, and recommendations. Data is anonymized before processing.
marketingConsentDesc: Receive occasional emails about new features, lean manufacturing tips, and product updates. You can unsubscribe at any time.
dataExportDesc: Download all your data in JSON format. This includes your profile, production records, lean analyses, and audit logs (GDPR Art. 20 — Right to data portability).
emailNotificationsDesc: Receive email alerts for critical Andon events, overdue actions, and QC failures
currencyDesc: Select the currency used for savings, costs, and financial values across the app
logoHint: Your company logo appears in report headers and the sidebar. PNG, JPG, or SVG, max 2 MB.
confirmRemoveLogo: Are you sure you want to remove the company logo?
uploadLogo: Drag and drop your logo here, or click to browse
logoErrorType: Only PNG, JPG, or SVG files are allowed
logoErrorSize: File is too large. Maximum 2 MB.
tutorialDesc: Replay the onboarding tutorial to learn about all available tools.
beginnerModeDesc: When enabled, every tool page shows a description of what it does, when to use it, and how it connects to other tools. The problem-solving flow guide (Identify → Analyze → Root Cause → Action) is also always visible.
auditLabelHint: Choose whether your factory uses 5S or 6S methodology
